name: methylong
description: nf-core/methylong 2.0.0 — DNA methylation analysis from long reads (ONT/PacBio). Preprocessing → alignment → methylation calling → SNV calling → haplotype phasing → DMR calling.

kwargs.input: [REQUIRED] Path to samplesheet CSV. Columns: group,sample,path,ref,method (method: ont or pacbio)
kwargs.outdir: [REQUIRED] Output directory path (absolute path recommended). [default: results]
kwargs.dorado_modification: ONT modification type for dorado. [default: 5mC_5hmC] For ONT Fiber-seq with 6mA analysis, use: 5mCG_5hmCG 6mA
kwargs.pacbio_modcall: [boolean] Enable modcalling in PacBio workflow (for unmodified BAM input).
kwargs.no_trim: [boolean] Skip trimming step in ONT workflow.
kwargs.reset: [boolean] Remove alignment info and reset flags before processing.
kwargs.ont_aligner: Aligner for ONT workflow. (accepted: dorado, minimap2) [default: dorado]
kwargs.pacbio_aligner: Aligner for PacBio workflow. (accepted: pbmm2, minimap2) [default: pbmm2]
kwargs.pileup_method: Pileup method for PacBio workflow. (accepted: pbcpgtools, modkit) [default: pbcpgtools]
kwargs.pileup_count: [boolean] Use count mode in pbcpgtools pileup instead of model mode.
kwargs.all_contexts: [boolean] Include all cytosine contexts in pileup.
kwargs.m6a: [boolean] Pileup m6A motif. Use ONLY for ONT Fiber-seq (method=ont + --fiberseq) when user explicitly says 'm6A'. NEVER use for standard DNA 5mC/5hmC methylation analysis — '5mC', '5mc', 'CpG methylation', 'DNA methylation' are NOT m6A and must NOT trigger this flag.
kwargs.fiberseq: [boolean] Enable Fiber-seq analysis (m6A calling, nucleosome/MSP annotations). For PacBio Fiber-seq: --fiberseq alone is sufficient. For ONT Fiber-seq: use --fiberseq together with --m6a and set --dorado_modification to '5mCG_5hmCG 6mA'.
kwargs.skip_snvs: [boolean] Skip SNV calling and haplotype phasing steps.
kwargs.dmr_a: Group name A for population-scale DMR comparison. REQUIRED whenever --dmr_population_scale is set — NEVER omit it. Value must be copied verbatim from the group name the user stated (e.g. user says 'group1 vs group2' → value is 'group1').
kwargs.dmr_b: Group name B for population-scale DMR comparison. REQUIRED whenever --dmr_population_scale is set — NEVER omit it. Value must be copied verbatim from the group name the user stated (e.g. user says 'group1 vs group2' → value is 'group2').
kwargs.haplotype_dmrer: DMR caller for haplotype-level analysis. (accepted: dss, modkit) [default: dss] OMIT this flag unless the user explicitly names the tool (e.g. 'use modkit dmr', 'not DSS'). DO NOT infer from speed or convenience — the absence of this flag means DSS is used.
kwargs.population_dmrer: DMR caller for population-scale analysis. (accepted: dss, modkit) [default: dss] OMIT this flag unless the user explicitly names the tool. DO NOT infer from speed or convenience.
